creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 229314
Screenshot: broken URL

Examples: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=loader.conf&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD+12.2-RELEASE#DEFAULT%09SETTINGS>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=loader.conf&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD+13.0-RELEASE#DEFAULT%09SETTINGS>

Please, can something other than %09 be used? 

The current use seems to cause problems for extensions such as: 

Display #Anchors
<https://addons.mozilla.org/addon/display-_anchors/>

– when pointed at, and when copied, the horizontal tab is missing. 

Thanks
